mapper.select: SELECT * FROM faq WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (deleted = 0 OR deleted IS NULL) ORDER BY view_count DESC, id ASC LIMIT 50
SELECT * FROM faq WHERE status = #{status} AND (deleted = 0 OR deleted IS NULL) ORDER BY view_count DESC, id ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT * FROM faq WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (deleted = 0 OR deleted IS NULL) AND (question LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR answer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY view_count DESC, id ASC LIMIT 20
mapper.update: UPDATE faq SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND (deleted = 0 OR deleted IS NULL)
